query:
insert into feeds (id, title, feed_url, site_url, last_synced_at, sync_started_at) values ($1, $2, $3, $4, now(), NULL)
            on conflict (feed_url) do update set
                title = $2,
                site_url = $4,
                updated_at = now(),
                sync_started_at = NULL,
                last_synced_at = now()
            returning id
